log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Owlin — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Owlin — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Owlin — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Owlin — Unarmored Caster.
→ Owlin — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 20] FAIL! 34 necrotic damage. HP: 33/67
══ ROUND 3 ══

--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
